final:
module RefModule (
	input clk,
	input rst_n,
	input enable,
	output reg [4-1:1-1] count
);

    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
